name_en: MIUMIU IVY White Canvas and Calfskin Tote

MIUMIU IVY White Canvas and Calfskin Tote
White Canvas
High-end calfskin texture, soft canvas➕flowing silhouette, the front letter logo looks premium

Celebrity style, boutique quality✨
